subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: governance/rights/politics rebuilt from independent sources (IMF, World Bank, V-Dem, Freedom House, HRW, TI, UNICEF/OCHA, ISS) + independent press; Zimbabwean state media EXCLUDED there, with economics IMF/World-Bank-validated (not RBZ self-reports).
A serial-currency-collapse economy (the 2024 gold-backed ZiG struggling) locked out of IMF financing by ~25 years of arrears, under entrenched ZANU-PF rule.

Standout drags: a defaulted/arrears-locked state, serial currency collapses, a severe drought/power crisis, a collapsed health system, and ZANU-PF capture; the mineral endowment is the offset. Overall: negative.

economic.notes: A defaulted, arrears-locked state with serial currency collapses and a mineral-but-dysfunctional base.

fiscal_state.notes: Debt assessed unsustainable, with ~25 years of arrears locking it out of IMF financing; a 2026 staff-monitored program is only a re-engagement step. (IMF reports 2025-26)

monetary_independence.notes: Serial currency collapses; the 2024 gold-backed ZiG has low credibility, with heavy dollarization and a parallel premium. (IMF; World Bank)

reserve_currency_intl_monetary.notes: Not a reserve currency; de-facto USD-reliant. (IMF)

inflation.notes: Tamed to ~4% in early 2026 under tight policy, but a hyperinflation history keeps forward risk high. (IMF WEO)

banking_stability.notes: Fragile, dollarized, low-confidence, under domestic-arrears pressure. (Coface; World Bank)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: A top-tier mineral endowment (Africa's largest lithium reserves, gold/PGM), but a 2026 raw-mineral export ban, ~90% Chinese-controlled mining, smuggling, and arrears-locking. (Al Jazeera)

institutional.notes: ZANU-PF capture with no judicial independence, a property-rights legacy, and a pressured press.

rule_of_law.notes: Party capture, no judicial independence, a land-seizure property legacy, and entrenched corruption. (Freedom House; HRW)

statistical_integrity.notes: Weak and politicised; usable only where IMF-reconstructed. (IMF)

civil_service_capacity.notes: Patronage-driven and hollowed by brain drain. (World Bank; HRW)

press_freedom.notes: A 2025 association law curbing NGOs and politically-motivated journalist arrests - a regression. (HRW; Freedom House)

political_social.notes: Entrenched ZANU-PF rule with a term-extension push, surging abuses, and a crushed opposition.

political_stability.notes: ZANU-PF entrenched since 1980; a disputed 2023 vote and an active term-extension push stoking violence - managed/suppressed stability. (Al Jazeera; ISS)

civil_liberties.notes: A fractured/crushed opposition and surging documented abuses. (V-Dem; HRW)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: An emigration source, not a destination. (inferred; UNICEF)

social_cohesion.notes: Shona/Ndebele and party-versus-opposition cleavages amid economic despair. (HRW; Freedom House)

demographics.notes: Young but with mass brain-drain emigration (especially health workers). (DevelopmentAid)

geopolitical.notes: Isolated from the West, China/Russia-leaning, and arrears-locked from finance.

alliance_reliability.notes: Isolated from the West (targeted sanctions) with a China/Russia 'Look East' lean and Chinese mining dominance. (US sources; HRW)

conflict_involvement.notes: No interstate war, with repression-driven internal instability. (ISS)

sanctions_capital_controls.notes: Targeted Western sanctions on officials/entities, arrears-locked from finance, with export controls. (IMF; Al Jazeera)

physical_practical.notes: A severe drought/power crisis and a collapsed health system, with decayed infrastructure.

climate.notes: Recurrent drought (incl. Cyclone Idai flooding), governance-eroded readiness, rain-fed/hydropower stress. (ND-GAIN; WB)

healthcare.notes: A collapsed public system, recurrent cholera, and a doctor exodus compounded by aid cuts. (Health Policy Watch; UNICEF)

disaster_insurance.notes: Very low penetration against extreme drought/flood exposure. (inferred)

summary: An economy defined by serial currency collapses - the 2024 gold-backed ZiG is the latest struggling attempt - and ~25 years of arrears that lock it out of IMF financing, under entrenched ZANU-PF rule with no judicial independence, a land-seizure property legacy, and a term-extension push stoking violence. A top-tier mineral endowment (Africa's largest lithium reserves) is undercut by an export ban, Chinese-dominated mining, and smuggling. A severe 2024 drought drove a national power crisis, the health system has collapsed amid cholera and a medic exodus, and the country is isolated from Western finance. Negative throughout.
